/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/SNWriter.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SNWriter.dir/src/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SNWriter.dir/src/BinaryPatcher.cpp.o -o SNWriter  -lgtkmm-3.0 -latkmm-1.6 -lgdkmm-3.0 -lgiomm-2.4 -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -latk-1.0 -lcairo-gobject -lgio-2.0 -lpangomm-1.4 -lglibmm-2.4 -lcairomm-1.0 -lsigc-2.0 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lharfbuzz -lcairo -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0
